infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeSphere uses your location to share it with your trusted circle during an SOS.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeSphere uses your location during an active SOS to keep tracking live.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeSphere records audio during an SOS as evidence.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SafeSphere to use your location during emergencies.
